title: Tic Tac Toe

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Tic Tac Toe Game
description: Create a simple game of Tic Tac Toe where two players X and O can play against each other. The game should allow players to make their moves by clicking on empty spaces on the board. The game should also display the winner and reset the game when a player wins or when the game is a draw.
requirements
1. The game should have a 3x3 grid where players can make their moves.
2. The game should display the current player's symbol (X or O) next to the grid.
3. The game should check for a winner after each move and display a message if there is a winner.
4. The game should check for a draw if all spaces are filled and there is no winner.
5. The game should reset the board when a player wins or when the game is a draw.

constraints: Use HTML, CSS and JavaScript for the game.
The game should work in modern web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge etc.).
